gemma-4-E4B-it.text: This week I traveled to Chicago to deliver my final farewell address to the nation. It was an opportunity to say thank you, whether we've seen eye-to-eye or rarely agreed at all. My conversations with you, the American people in living rooms and schools, at farms and on factory floors, at diners and on distant military outposts. All these conversations are what have kept me honest
Hello, my name is John. I work as a software engineer in San Francisco.
The temperature today is 72 degrees Fahrenheit, the stock market closed at 15,234 points.
你好，我叫小明。我在台北的一家科技公司當軟體工程師。今天天氣非常好，我打算下班後去公園散步。最近我在學習機器學習,覺得非常有趣。
こんにちは。私の名前は田中です。東京でエンジニアとして働いています。

gemma4-e2b-mlx-4bit.text: This week I traveled to Chicago to deliver my final farewell address to the nation, following in the tradition of presidents before me. It was an opportunity to say thank you. Whether we've seen each other or rarely agreed at all, my conversations with you, the American people in living rooms and schools, at farms and on factory floors, at diners, and on distant military outposts. All these conversations are what have kept me honest.
